title: Gaussian Elimination Process
description: Systematic method for solving systems of linear equations
mermaid: graph TD A1[Input: System of Linear Equations (Augmented Matrix)] --> B1[Initialize: n = number of equations/variables] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 --> C1[Loop: for i = 1 to n-1] style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1 --"Yes"--> D1[Find Pivot: Find row j >= i with largest absolute value in column i] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1 --> E1{Is pivot value (matrix[j][i]) close to zero?} style E1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 E1 --"Yes"--> F1[Error: System may be singular or ill-conditioned] style F1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff E1 --"No"--> G1{Is j == i?} style G1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 G1 --"Yes"--> H1[No row swap needed] style H1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff G1 --"No"--> I1[Swap rows i and j] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> J1[Loop: for k = i+1 to n] I1 --> J1 style J1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 J1 --"Yes"--> K1[Calculate multiplier: factor = matrix[k][i] / matrix[i][i]] style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff K1 --> L1[Loop: for l = i to n+1 (all columns)] style L1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 L1 --"Yes"--> M1[Subtract (factor * row i) from row k: matrix[k][l] = matrix[k][l] - (factor * matrix[i][l])] style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff M1 --> L1 L1 --"No"--> N1[End inner loop (l)] style N1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff N1 --> J1 J1 --"No"--> O1[End inner loop (k)] style O1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff O1 --> C1 C1 --"No"--> P1[Back Substitution: Loop for i = n to 1] style P1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 P1 --"Yes"--> Q1[Calculate solution: x[i] = (matrix[i][n+1] - Sum(matrix[i][j] * x[j] for j = i+1 to n)) / matrix[i][i]] style Q1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff Q1 --> P1 P1 --"No"--> R1[Output: Solution vector x] style R1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff F1 --> R1
entities: Input: System of Linear Equations (Augmented Matrix)
/"Find Pivot: Find row j >= i with largest absolute value in column i"\

/"Back Substitution: Loop for i = n to 1"\
